description: validate_id (src/task.rs:174-182) rejects anything not matching bl-[a-f0-9]+. If a future bl ever emits uppercase hex (or mixed case for any reason), older clients reject the file at load. One-line forward-compat win: accept ascii_hexdigit (which is lower or upper), but keep generate_id emitting lowercase via hex::encode. Net effect: older bl can load files from a future bl that emitted uppercase, without changing what current bl writes. Update existing task_tests.rs test expectations.
title: validate_id accepts uppercase hex at load time
